results.evidence: Query functions exist in src/lib/queries/ (business.ts, category.ts, review.ts, user.ts not found but index exports business/category/review)
TypeScript types defined for all query inputs/outputs
Test files exist: result.test.ts (87 lines), business.test.ts (type tests), category.test.ts, review.test.ts. 56 tests PASS
src/stores/ exports: search, filters, pagination, auth, cart, toast
Stores use SSR-safe atom pattern, no window/document access
businesses/index.astro uses form-based filtering, NOT nanostores. Store imports not found in file
Category filter is static form submit, not using $categorySlug store for URL sync
No loading state using $searchLoading store during BusinessList fetch
Empty state is static HTML in BusinessList.astro:129-134, not reactive to $searchResultsCount
business/[slug].astro:24 uses db.select() directly, NOT getBusinessBySlug()
No getRelatedBusinesses() query integration found in business/[slug].astro
business/[slug].astro:80 uses db.select() for reviews, NOT getReviewsByBusinessId()

findings.title: Business Detail Page NOT Using Query Layer
findings.issue: Business detail page uses inline db.select() instead of getBusinessBySlug() query function from src/lib/queries/business.ts
findings.impact: AC-US4-01, AC-US4-02, AC-US4-03 BLOCKED: Query layer not used in main page. Code duplication remains.

findings.title: Reviews Query NOT Integrated
findings.issue: Reviews loaded via inline db.select() instead of getReviewsByBusinessId() from src/lib/queries/review.ts
findings.impact: AC-US4-03 BLOCKED: Reviews bypass query layer

findings.title: /businesses Page NOT Using Nanostores
findings.issue: Business listing page uses traditional form submission instead of nanostores for client-side reactive filtering. $searchQuery, $categorySlug, $sortBy stores not imported or used.
findings.suggestion:
Add client-side island that:
1. Imports { $searchQuery, $categorySlug, $sortBy, setSearchQuery, setCategory, setSortBy } from '@/stores'
2. Uses useStore() from @nanostores/react
3. Listens to input changes and updates stores
4. Triggers API call with debounce
findings.impact: AC-US3-01 through AC-US3-05 BLOCKED: Client-side reactive filtering not implemented

findings.title: BusinessList Island Reads URL Params Directly
findings.issue: BusinessList reads Astro.url.searchParams directly instead of using store values for filters. No loading/error states wired to stores.
findings.suggestion:
BusinessList should:
1. Accept filter props from parent component using stores
2. Use $searchLoading for loading state
3. Use $searchResultsCount for empty state logic
findings.impact: Stores exist but are disconnected from the island component

findings.title: No 300ms Debounced Search in /businesses
findings.issue: AC-US3-03 requires 300ms debounced search but form uses standard submit with full page reload
findings.impact: User experience: page reloads on every keystroke

findings.title: Extra Files Not in Spec
findings.issue: auth.ts and cart.ts exist in queries/ but spec only defines business.ts, category.ts, review.ts, user.ts
findings.suggestion: Remove auth.ts and cart.ts, or document why they are needed (scope creep)
findings.impact: Minor scope creep - 2 extra files not traceable to any AC

findings.title: user.ts Query File Missing
findings.issue: Spec FR-001 lists user.ts but it does not exist in queries/ directory
findings.suggestion: Create src/lib/queries/user.ts with getUserById() and getUserBusiness() functions per spec
findings.impact: Spec deviation - expected file not implemented
